overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a desert cyberpunk town during golden hour. The player character walks along sidewalks past phone booths, billboards, and palm trees, turns at an intersection past an adult store with neon signage, and continues toward a large circular billboard structure. The environment features a mix of futuristic towers and rundown commercial buildings with sparse pedestrian traffic.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a distinctive circular billboard tower with rotating advertisements. The sidewalk features arcade machines and vending machines while the corporate tower looms larger in the left background. A person sits on the curb near the palm trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit desert cyberpunk town that transitions from a quiet residential sidewalk into a dense, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by moving past futuristic phone booths and a large burger billboard under a golden sky, passing a lone pedestrian in red. As the camera continues along a graffiti-covered concrete wall, the street clears before reaching an intersection lined with palm trees. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right into a bustling commercial area, where the lighting becomes more vibrant with holographic advertisements and the neon signage of an adult store. Finally, the path leads past a camouflage tent and concrete barricades toward a towering corporate skyscraper and a distinctive circular billboard tower surrounded by arcade machines and vending machines.
